svg.title: Electrical schematic of the Sim Ruito translator box for PS5
svg.desc: Diagram showing the connections between Sim Ruito pedals, HX711 modules, Arduino Nano, and RJ45 output to the PXN base
svg.text: Warning: maximum signal injected into RJ45: ~2.0V - never connect 5V directly to PXN signal pins
Measured real range: ~23mV (rest) to ~1.99V (full press) - divider calibrated for this window
